# Copilot Instructions for Dooing.Task React Project

<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

## Project Overview
This is a React TypeScript project built with Vite for the Dooing.Task application - a modern task management application with Pomodoro timer functionality.

## Development Guidelines

### Component Structure
- Use functional components with TypeScript
- Implement proper prop typing with interfaces
- Follow component composition patterns
- Keep components small and focused on single responsibilities

### State Management
- Use React hooks (useState, useEffect, useContext)
- Consider state lifting for shared data
- Implement proper data flow between components

### Styling
- Use CSS Modules or styled-components for component-scoped styles
- Maintain the existing modern design system with gradients and glass morphism
- Ensure responsive design for mobile and desktop

### Code Quality
- Write clean, readable code with proper TypeScript types
- Use meaningful variable and function names
- Add JSDoc comments for complex functions
- Follow React best practices and patterns

### Project Features to Implement
- Task management (CRUD operations)
- Pomodoro timer functionality
- Sidebar navigation
- Modern UI with animations
- Theme switching
- Responsive design
- Local storage for persistence

### File Organization
- Components in `/src/components/`
- Hooks in `/src/hooks/`
- Utils in `/src/utils/`
- Types in `/src/types/`
- Styles in `/src/styles/`
